text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down sharply today—BTC losing 3.3% and ETH down 5.8%—signaling weakness across the major assets, though altcoins like SOL are holding steadier. The Fear & Greed index at 13 reflects extreme fear with momentum still negative over the week, suggesting capitulation rather than accumulation. BTC dominance rising to 55.9% paired with $105B in volume indicates traders are rotating into perceived safety rather than deploying fresh capital broadly.
